body.text: Virginia standoff breaks: court keeps background-check injunction in place; State Police stand down

The Lynchburg court rejected the AG's motion to dissolve the injunction against universal background checks on private sales, and the VSP agreed to stop the checks. Same cycle: May NICS posted with Virginia sales +103% and the prosecutor-refusal count verified at 14.

facts.title: 1. Virginia UBC injunction upheld - VSP stands down
2. NRA: LaPierre loses appeal; Foundation splits as 1791
3. VA hardware bans: 14 prosecutors refuse; sales double

body.text:
• VA: Lynchburg court keeps UBC injunction; State Police stand down
• May NICS posted: 1.11M checks +3.2%; Virginia +103% YoY
• 9th Cir. DeBorba: suppressors not 2A 'arms'; Sanchez overhang
• NRA: LaPierre appeal lost; 1791 Foundation split takes ~$176M
